'''竏嗷-ch-w-k''' ('''karachwekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vociferize|vociferize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ch-w-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vociferize|vociferize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗷-ch-w-k
|-
! Lemma
| karachwekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirachwekoko|thirachwekoko]] || [[word:jirachwekoko|jirachwekoko]] || [[word:shirachwekoko|shirachwekoko]] || [[word:kirachwekoko|kirachwekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurachwekoko|thuthurachwekoko]] || [[word:jujurachwekoko|jujurachwekoko]] || [[word:shushurachwekoko|shushurachwekoko]] || [[word:kukurachwekoko|kukurachwekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurachwekoko|thurachwekoko]] || [[word:jurachwekoko|jurachwekoko]] || [[word:shurachwekoko|shurachwekoko]] || [[word:kurachwekoko|kurachwekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurachwekoko|thurachwekoko]] || [[word:jurachwekoko|jurachwekoko]] || [[word:shurachwekoko|shurachwekoko]] || [[word:kurachwekoko|kurachwekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therachwekoko|therachwekoko]] || [[word:jerachwekoko|jerachwekoko]] || [[word:sherachwekoko|sherachwekoko]] || [[word:kerachwekoko|kerachwekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorachwekoko|thothorachwekoko]] || [[word:jojorachwekoko|jojorachwekoko]] || [[word:shoshorachwekoko|shoshorachwekoko]] || [[word:kokorachwekoko|kokorachwekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorachwekoko|thorachwekoko]] || [[word:jorachwekoko|jorachwekoko]] || [[word:shorachwekoko|shorachwekoko]] || [[word:korachwekoko|korachwekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorachwekoko|thorachwekoko]] || [[word:jorachwekoko|jorachwekoko]] || [[word:shorachwekoko|shorachwekoko]] || [[word:korachwekoko|korachwekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦrachwekoko|thﾃｦrachwekoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦrachwekoko|jﾃｦrachwekoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦrachwekoko|shﾃｦrachwekoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦrachwekoko|kﾃｦrachwekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharachwekoko|thatharachwekoko]] || [[word:jajarachwekoko|jajarachwekoko]] || [[word:shasharachwekoko|shasharachwekoko]] || [[word:kakarachwekoko|kakarachwekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharachwekoko|tharachwekoko]] || [[word:jarachwekoko|jarachwekoko]] || [[word:sharachwekoko|sharachwekoko]] || [[word:karachwekoko|karachwekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharachwekoko|tharachwekoko]] || [[word:jarachwekoko|jarachwekoko]] || [[word:sharachwekoko|sharachwekoko]] || [[word:karachwekoko|karachwekoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
